summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Two new features (camera barcode scan + CSV bulk upload) tested successfully. All 36 backend tests pass (30 original + 6 new CSV tests). Frontend features working: camera modal opens with graceful error handling in headless browser, CSV upload dialog functional with template download and file upload, inventory updates reflected in UI.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing state declarations in Inventory.jsx (csvOpen, uploading, csvResult, fileRef)
Fixed: UTF-8 BOM handling in CSV upload - added lstrip('\ufeff') to header and row key processing
MOCKED: Email sending in POST /api/orders/{id}/send still mocked (returns email_sent=false, mock=true)

success_rate.backend: 100% (36/36 tests passed - 30 original + 6 new CSV tests)

seed_data_creation: Demo workspace with 50 products, 3 suppliers auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added camera barcode scanning (html5-qrcode) and CSV bulk upload. Camera will fail in headless browser - this is expected, verify graceful error handling. CSV upload endpoint at POST /api/inventory/csv accepts multipart file with headers gtin,current_stock,min_threshold,max_threshold. All 36 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/ cover full API.

new_backend_features: POST /api/inventory/csv - updates existing products and returns {updated, created, not_found} ✓
POST /api/inventory/csv - creates inventory_logs entry with reason='csv_upload' ✓
POST /api/inventory/csv - ignores rows with empty gtin ✓
new_frontend_features: /dashboard - Camera button [data-testid=dashboard-camera-btn] visible next to Tara button ✓
/dashboard - Camera modal opens with title 'Barkod tara' ✓
/dashboard - Camera error message displays gracefully in headless browser ✓
/stok - CSV upload button [data-testid=inventory-csv-btn] opens Dialog (not placeholder toast) ✓
/stok - CSV Dialog shows header description, template download link, file drop zone ✓
/stok - CSV upload triggers POST /api/inventory/csv and shows result panel ✓
/stok - After CSV upload, inventory table reflects new stock values ✓
regression_tests: Dashboard scan bar finds products by GTIN ✓
Dashboard quick order from critical stock works ✓
Inventory page loads with all products ✓

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing state declarations for csvOpen, uploading, csvResult, and fileRef
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added useState and useRef declarations at component top

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: UTF-8 BOM character not stripped from CSV header and row keys
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added lstrip('\ufeff') to header check and row key processing
